free_text: obtained from electronuclear reaction cross  sections
using virtual  photon  spectrum.  Ground-state  cross
sections were  extracted  from  the  end-point energy
Correction for  the  average  energy  loss by particle
passing through the target was  made  by  adding  the
energy loss  (deltaE-1/2)  corresponding  to the half
the target thickness in the direction of emission.
The ground-state    cross    sections    and   angular
9Be(g,d)   are  reported,  together  with  the  cross
section  for  the  9Be(g,d)  reaction  to  the  first
excited state. Qualitative discussions of these cross
sections are made on the  basis  of  a  simple  model
which  assumes free clusters in 9Be.  This is similar
to the two-cluster model indicate the  importance  of
and  7Li.  The  observed  angular  distributions  are
consistent  with  contributions  due  to  E1  and  E2
Data were  compiled at the Russia MSU SINP
